acceptance_criteria: The document has a Validation Repair Smoke heading
tasks.description: Create a small factual proof note for a controlled Symphony failure-path smoke. Keep the change intentionally tiny. This task exists to prove that a transient validation failure during finalization can be recovered by the automated repair/retry path while preserving normal review and merge behavior.
tasks.title: Exercise finalization repair smoke path

commands: test -f tmp/failure-smoke-once || (mkdir -p tmp && touch tmp/failure-smoke-once && false)
